languages.text: "В иных обстоятельствах я действовала бы куда осмотрительнее. Но у тебя впереди еще множество петель, и, если мы ошибемся, ты сумеешь это исправить. Решено. Я прикажу арестовать Изимонда".

traits.locale_text: "В иных обстоятельствах я действовала бы куда осмотрительнее. Но у тебя впереди еще множество петель, и, если мы ошибемся, ты сумеешь это исправить. Решено. Я прикажу арестовать Изимонда".

languages.text: "Under any other circumstances, I would be far more prudent in my approach. But you have many loops ahead of you, and if we make a mistake, you will be able to fix it. It is decided, then. I shall order the arrest of Isimond Sauerback."
languages.original_text: "В иных обстоятельствах я действовала бы куда осмотрительнее. Но у тебя впереди еще множество петель, и, если мы ошибемся, ты сумеешь это исправить. Решено. Я прикажу арестовать Изимонда".

traits.locale_text: "Under any other circumstances, I would be far more prudent in my approach. But you have many loops ahead of you, and if we make a mistake, you will be able to fix it. It is decided, then. I shall order the arrest of Isimond Sauerback."

"Under any other circumstances, I would be far more prudent in my approach. But you have many loops ahead of you, and if we make a mistake, you will be able to fix it. It is decided, then. I shall order the arrest of Isimond Sauerback."

"Under any other circumstances, I would be far more prudent in my approach. But you have many loops ahead of you, and if we make a mistake, you will be able to fix it. It is decided, then. I shall order the arrest of Isimond Sauerback."

languages.text: “换作别的情况，我行事会比这谨慎得多。但你还会经历很多次循环，就算我们出了差错，你也能补救。那就这么定了。我这就下令逮捕伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克。”
languages.original_text: "Under any other circumstances, I would be far more prudent in my approach. But you have many loops ahead of you, and if we make a mistake, you will be able to fix it. It is decided, then. I shall order the arrest of Isimond Sauerback."

traits.locale_text: “换作别的情况，我行事会比这谨慎得多。但你还会经历很多次循环，就算我们出了差错，你也能补救。那就这么定了。我这就下令逮捕伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克。”

languages.text: « En toute autre circonstance, j'aborderais la question avec une prudence redoublée, mais puisque vous avez tout le temps devant vous et que l'erreur nous est permise, c'est décidé. Je vais ordonner l'arrestation d'Isimond Sauerback. »
languages.original_text: "Under any other circumstances, I would be far more prudent in my approach. But you have many loops ahead of you, and if we make a mistake, you will be able to fix it. It is decided, then. I shall order the arrest of Isimond Sauerback."

traits.locale_text: « En toute autre circonstance, j'aborderais la question avec une prudence redoublée, mais puisque vous avez tout le temps devant vous et que l'erreur nous est permise, c'est décidé. Je vais ordonner l'arrestation d'Isimond Sauerback. »

languages.text: "Bu mevzuya başka koşullar altında çok daha ihtiyatlı yaklaşırdım. Ancak sizi bekleyen daha sürüyle döngü var. Yani hatamız olsa bile yanlışımızı düzeltebilirsiniz. O hâlde kararımı verdim. İsimond Sauerback'in tutuklanmasını emredeceğim."
languages.original_text: "Under any other circumstances, I would be far more prudent in my approach. But you have many loops ahead of you, and if we make a mistake, you will be able to fix it. It is decided, then. I shall order the arrest of Isimond Sauerback."

traits.locale_text: "Bu mevzuya başka koşullar altında çok daha ihtiyatlı yaklaşırdım. Ancak sizi bekleyen daha sürüyle döngü var. Yani hatamız olsa bile yanlışımızı düzeltebilirsiniz. O hâlde kararımı verdim. İsimond Sauerback'in tutuklanmasını emredeceğim."

languages.text: «En cualquier otra circunstancia, sería mucho más prudente, pero aún le esperan muchos bucles y, si nos equivocamos, será capaz de arreglarlo. Está decidido, pues. Ordenaré la detención de Isimond Sauerback».
languages.original_text: "Under any other circumstances, I would be far more prudent in my approach. But you have many loops ahead of you, and if we make a mistake, you will be able to fix it. It is decided, then. I shall order the arrest of Isimond Sauerback."

traits.locale_text: «En cualquier otra circunstancia, sería mucho más prudente, pero aún le esperan muchos bucles y, si nos equivocamos, será capaz de arreglarlo. Está decidido, pues. Ordenaré la detención de Isimond Sauerback».

languages.text: "Auf gar keinen Fall. Ich würde deutlich besonnener vorgehen. Aber vor Euch liegen noch viele Schleifen, und wenn wir einen Fehler machen, könnt Ihr ihn berichtigen. Es ist also beschlossen. Ich lasse Isimond Sauerback verhaften."
languages.original_text: "Under any other circumstances, I would be far more prudent in my approach. But you have many loops ahead of you, and if we make a mistake, you will be able to fix it. It is decided, then. I shall order the arrest of Isimond Sauerback."

traits.locale_text: "Auf gar keinen Fall. Ich würde deutlich besonnener vorgehen. Aber vor Euch liegen noch viele Schleifen, und wenn wir einen Fehler machen, könnt Ihr ihn berichtigen. Es ist also beschlossen. Ich lasse Isimond Sauerback verhaften."

languages.text: 「通常であれば、私はもっと慎重に進むでしょう。しかし、あなたはまだ多くのループを前にしています。もし私たちが間違えれば、あなたはそれを修正することができます。決まりました。私はイシモンド・ザウアーバックの逮捕を命じます。」
languages.original_text: "Under any other circumstances, I would be far more prudent in my approach. But you have many loops ahead of you, and if we make a mistake, you will be able to fix it. It is decided, then. I shall order the arrest of Isimond Sauerback."

traits.locale_text: 「通常であれば、私はもっと慎重に進むでしょう。しかし、あなたはまだ多くのループを前にしています。もし私たちが間違えれば、あなたはそれを修正することができます。決まりました。私はイシモンド・ザウアーバックの逮捕を命じます。」
